<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>For My Love ❤️</title>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<style>
:root{
  --pink:#ff5fa2;
  --deep:#0b0614;
  --glow:0 0 20px rgba(255,95,162,.9);
  --glow2:0 0 40px rgba(255,95,162,.6);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{
  min-height:100vh;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#1a0d2e,var(--deep));
  color:#fff;
  font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:center;
  align-items:center;
  text-align:center;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}

/* ── VIEWS ── */
.view{display:none;width:100%;max-width:500px;padding:24px 16px;animation:fadeUp .7s ease}
.view.active{display:block}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ── TYPOGRAPHY ── */
h1,h2{color:var(--pink);text-shadow:var(--glow);margin-bottom:12px}
h1{font-size:2rem}
h2{font-size:1.5rem}
p{line-height:1.7;font-size:1rem}

/* ── BUTTONS ── */
.btn{
  background:var(--pink);
  border:none;
  padding:12px 28px;
  border-radius:999px;
  color:#fff;
  font-size:1rem;
  font-weight:600;
  box-shadow:var(--glow);
  cursor:pointer;
  margin:8px;
  transition:.3s;
  display:inline-block;
}
.btn:hover{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 0 36px var(--pink)}

/* ── INPUT ── */
.inp{
  padding:12px 16px;
  border-radius:14px;
  border:2px solid rgba(255,95,162,.4);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  color:#fff;
  font-size:1rem;
  outline:none;
  width:220px;
  margin:8px;
  transition:.3s;
}
.inp:focus{border-color:var(--pink);box-shadow:var(--glow)}
.inp::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.4)}

/* ════════════════════════════════
   HEART — fixed 3D pulse
════════════════════════════════ */
.heart-wrap{
  display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;
  height:150px;margin:20px 0;
}
.heart-svg{
  width:130px;height:130px;
  animation:heartbeat 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px #ff5fa2) drop-shadow(0 0 40px #ff2076);
}
@keyframes heartbeat{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}
  14%{transform:scale(1.18)}
  28%{transform:scale(1)}
  42%{transform:scale(1.12)}
  70%{transform:scale(1)}
}

/* ── TIC TAC TOE ── */
.board{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,88px);
  gap:12px;
  justify-content:center;
  margin:18px auto;
}
.cell{
  width:88px;height:88px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:2.2rem;
  border-radius:16px;
  cursor:pointer;
  border:2px solid var(--pink);
  box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,95,162,.5);
  transition:.25s;
}
.cell:hover{background:rgba(255,95,162,.15);box-shadow:var(--glow)}

/* ── GLOW TEXT ── */
.glow-txt{
  font-size:1.15rem;
  line-height:1.9;
  color:#fff;
  text-shadow:0 0 8px var(--pink),0 0 20px rgba(255,95,162,.5);
  min-height:80px;
  white-space:pre-line;
}

/* ── SHAYARI CARDS ── */
.shayari-card{
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,95,162,.3);
  border-radius:20px;
  padding:24px;
  margin:16px 0;
  backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 30px rgba(255,95,162,.1),var(--glow2);
}

/* ── NAME LEVEL ── */
.name-box{
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,95,162,.3);
  border-radius:20px;
  padding:28px 20px;
  margin:12px 0;
}
.name-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:10px 0}
.name-label{color:var(--pink);font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;min-width:80px;text-align:right}

/* ── SLIDESHOW ── */
.slide-wrap{
  position:relative;
  width:280px;height:340px;
  margin:16px auto;
  border-radius:20px;
  overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--pink),0 0 60px rgba(255,95,162,.4);
  border:3px solid var(--pink);
}
.slide-wrap img{
  width:100%;height:100%;
  object-fit:cover;
  position:absolute;top:0;left:0;
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity 1s ease;
}
.slide-wrap img.visible{opacity:1}
.slide-quote{
  margin:14px auto;
  max-width:320px;
  font-size:1rem;
  color:#ffb3d1;
  text-shadow:0 0 10px var(--pink);
  font-style:italic;
  min-height:48px;
  transition:.5s;
}
.slide-dots{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:10px}
.dot{
  width:10px;height:10px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.3);
  transition:.3s;
}
.dot.active{background:var(--pink);box-shadow:var(--glow)}

/* ── MUSIC SECTION ── */
.music-card{
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.08);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,95,162,.3);
  border-radius:20px;
  padding:20px;
  margin:12px 0;
  cursor:pointer;
  transition:.3s;
}
.music-card:hover{background:rgba(255,95,162,.18);box-shadow:var(--glow)}
.music-card.playing{
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.2);
  box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--pink);
  animation:musicPulse 2s infinite;
}
@keyframes musicPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--pink)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 50px var(--pink)}}
.music-note{font-size:2rem;display:block;margin-bottom:6px}
.hearts-rain{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:999}

/* ── SURPRISE BOX ── */
.box-wrap{
  position:relative;
  width:160px;height:160px;
  margin:20px auto;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.surprise-box{
  width:160px;height:160px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff5fa2,#ff2076);
  border-radius:20px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:5rem;
  box-shadow:0 0 40px var(--pink),0 0 80px rgba(255,95,162,.5);
  animation:boxPulse 2s infinite;
  transition:.3s;
}
@keyframes boxPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.06)}}
.box-lid{
  width:180px;height:50px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff7bb5,#ff2076);
  border-radius:14px;
  position:absolute;
  top:-10px;left:-10px;
  box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--pink);
  transition:1s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  transform-origin:center left;
}
.box-wrap.open .box-lid{transform:rotate(-140deg) translateY(-30px);opacity:0}
.box-wrap.open .surprise-box{animation:none;transform:scale(0.95)}

/* ── I LOVE YOU PGLI ── */
.iloveu{
  font-size:2.8rem;
  font-weight:900;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff5fa2,#fff,#ff5fa2);
  background-size:200%;
  -webkit-background-clip:text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  background-clip:text;
  animation:shimmer 1.5s infinite,smash .6s ease;
  display:none;
  margin:20px 0;
  text-shadow:none;
  letter-spacing:2px;
}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:0%}100%{background-position:200%}}
@keyframes smash{0%{transform:scale(3);opacity:0}60%{transform:scale(.9)}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}

.final-line{
  font-size:1.2rem;
  color:#ffb3d1;
  max-width:340px;
  margin:0 auto;
  display:none;
  animation:typeIn 2s steps(50) forwards;
  overflow:hidden;
  white-space:nowrap;
  border-right:2px solid var(--pink);
}
@keyframes typeIn{from{width:0}to{width:100%}}

/* ── FLOATING EMOJIS ── */
.floaty{
  position:fixed;
  font-size:28px;
  pointer-events:none;
  animation:floatUp 3s linear forwards;
  z-index:9999;
}
@keyframes floatUp{0%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(-100vh) scale(.5);opacity:0}}

/* ── PROGRESS BAR ── */
.level-bar{
  display:flex;gap:6px;justify-content:center;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}
.lv{
  width:36px;height:6px;
  border-radius:99px;
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.2);
  transition:.5s;
}
.lv.done{background:var(--pink);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--pink)}

/* ── MIC ── */
.mic-area{
  background:rgba(255,95,162,.08);
  border:2px dashed rgba(255,95,162,.4);
  border-radius:20px;
  padding:24px;
  margin:16px 0;
}
.mic-btn{
  width:80px;height:80px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--pink);
  border:none;
  font-size:2.2rem;
  cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:var(--glow);
  transition:.3s;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin:12px auto;
}
.mic-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:0 0 40px var(--pink)}
.mic-btn.listening{
  animation:micPulse 1s infinite;
  background:#ff2076;
}
@keyframes micPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--pink)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 60px #ff2076,0 0 100px var(--pink)}}
.mic-wave{
  display:flex;gap:4px;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-end;
  height:40px;margin:12px auto;
}
.wave-bar{
  width:6px;border-radius:99px;
  background:var(--pink);
  animation:wave 1s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.wave-bar:nth-child(1){animation-delay:0s;height:10px}
.wave-bar:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.1s;height:20px}
.wave-bar:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.2s;height:30px}
.wave-bar:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.3s;height:20px}
.wave-bar:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.4s;height:10px}
@keyframes wave{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(.4)}50%{transform:scaleY(1)}}
.wave-bar.paused{animation-play-state:paused;transform:scaleY(.3)}


/* ── CUSTOM AUDIO PLAYER ── */
.player-bar{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,95,162,.3);
}
.play-pause-btn{
  background:var(--pink);border:none;color:#fff;
  width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;
  font-size:.9rem;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;
  box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255,95,162,.6);
  transition:.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.play-pause-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:var(--glow)}
.progress-track{
  flex:1;height:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);
  border-radius:99px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.progress-fill{
  height:100%;background:var(--pink);border-radius:99px;
  width:0%;transition:width .3s linear;
  box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--pink);
}
.time-txt{font-size:.75rem;color:#ffb3d1;flex-shrink:0;min-width:34px}
.vol-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;padding:2px}

/* scrollable area for long content */
.scroll-inner{max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px}
.scroll-inner::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
.scroll-inner::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--pink);border-radius:99px}

/* NOT button dodge */
#notBtn{position:relative}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ════════ PASSWORD ════════ -->
<section class="view active" id="pass">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <h1>Welcome My Love ❤️</h1>
    <div class="heart-wrap">
      <svg class="heart-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <defs>
          <radialGradient id="hg" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="70%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff8ec8"/>
            <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#ff2076"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#a0003a"/>
          </radialGradient>
        </defs>
        <path d="M50 85 C50 85 5 55 5 28 A22 22 0 0 1 50 18 A22 22 0 0 1 95 28 C95 55 50 85 50 85Z"
              fill="url(#hg)"/>
        <path d="M32 26 C32 20 40 16 46 22" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.35)" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <p style="color:#ffb3d1;margin-bottom:16px">Enter Secret Password 🔐</p>
    <div>
      <input id="pwd" class="inp" type="password" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Password..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')unlock()">
    </div>
    <div>
      <input id="uname" class="inp" placeholder="Your Name 💕" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')unlock()">
    </div>
    <br>
    <button class="btn" onclick="unlock()">Enter 💖</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ QUESTION ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="question">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <div class="heart-wrap">
      <svg class="heart-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <defs><radialGradient id="hg2" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="70%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff8ec8"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#ff2076"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#a0003a"/></radialGradient></defs>
        <path d="M50 85 C50 85 5 55 5 28 A22 22 0 0 1 50 18 A22 22 0 0 1 95 28 C95 55 50 85 50 85Z" fill="url(#hg2)"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <h2>Kya Tum Mujhse Pyaar Karti Ho? 😘</h2>
    <br>
    <button class="btn" onclick="show('game')">Haan Bilkul ❤️</button>
    <button class="btn" id="notBtn" onmouseover="dodgeBtn(this)" style="background:#555">Nahi 😜</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ TIC TAC TOE ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="game">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <h2>Tic Tac Toe 💕</h2>
    <p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:8px">Game jeeto toh aage badhna milega 😉</p>
    <div class="board" id="board">
      <div class="cell" onclick="move(0)"></div><div class="cell" onclick="move(1)"></div><div class="cell" onclick="move(2)"></div>
      <div class="cell" onclick="move(3)"></div><div class="cell" onclick="move(4)"></div><div class="cell" onclick="move(5)"></div>
      <div class="cell" onclick="move(6)"></div><div class="cell" onclick="move(7)"></div><div class="cell" onclick="move(8)"></div>
    </div>
    <p id="gStatus" style="color:var(--pink);font-size:1.1rem;min-height:28px"></p>
    <button class="btn" id="resetBtn" onclick="resetGame()" style="display:none;margin-top:8px">Dobara Khelo 🎮</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ LEVEL 1 — SHAYARI ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="lv1">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <div class="level-bar"><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv"></div><div class="lv"></div><div class="lv"></div><div class="lv"></div></div>
    <h2>Sirf Tere Liye ❤️</h2>
    <p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:14px">Level 1 — Shayari</p>
    <div class="shayari-card">
      <p class="glow-txt" id="sText"></p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin:10px 0" id="sDots">
      <div class="dot active"></div><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn" id="sNextBtn" onclick="nextShayari()">Agli Shayari 💕</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ LEVEL 2 — NAME VERIFY ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="lv2">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <div class="level-bar"><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv"></div><div class="lv"></div><div class="lv"></div></div>
    <h2>ENTER YOUR NAME   💝</h2>
    <p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:14px">Level 2 — Pehchaan</p>
    <div class="name-box">
      <div class="name-row">
        <span class="name-label">Tum 👧</span>
        <input class="inp" id="herName" placeholder="your name...">
      </div>
      <div class="name-row">
        <span class="name-label">Woh 👦</span>
        <input class="inp" id="hisName" placeholder="your partner name...">
      </div>
      <br>
      <button class="btn" onclick="verifyNames()">Submit 💖</button>
      <p id="nameErr" style="color:#ff6b6b;margin-top:10px;font-size:.9rem"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ LEVEL 3 — SLIDESHOW ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="lv3">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <div class="level-bar"><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv"></div><div class="lv"></div></div>
    <h2>Teri Khoobsoorat Yaadein 📸</h2>
    <p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:10px">Level 3 — Photo Gallery</p>
    <div class="slide-wrap" id="slideWrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," id="sl0" class="visible">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," id="sl1">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," id="sl2">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," id="sl3">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," id="sl4">
    </div>
    <div class="slide-dots" id="slideDots">
      <div class="dot active"></div><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div><div class="dot"></div>
    </div>
    <p class="slide-quote" id="slideQ"></p>
    <button class="btn" id="slNextBtn" onclick="show('lv4')">Aage Badhte Hain 💫</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ LEVEL 4 — SONGS ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="lv4">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <div class="level-bar"><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv"></div></div>
    <h2>Hamare Gaane 🎵</h2>
    <p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:14px">Level 4 — Dil ke Raag</p>

    <!-- SONG 1 -->
    
     

    <!-- UPLOAD YOUR OWN SONGS INSTRUCTIONS (hidden) -->
    <!-- Bro: Agar chahiye exact Humsafar/Dil Ka Rishta song, to:
         1) MP3 file download karo
         2) Notepad open karo, ye replace karo:
            <source src="YOUR_MP3_URL_HERE">
         3) Ya phir local file ke liye FileReader se base64 load karo -->

    >

    <div id="heartsRain" class="hearts-rain" style="display:none"></div>
    <br>
    <button class="btn" onclick="show('lv5')">Last Surprise! 🎁</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ════════ LEVEL 5 — SURPRISE BOX ════════ -->
<section class="view" id="lv5">
  <div class="scroll-inner">
    <div class="level-bar"><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div><div class="lv done"></div></div>
    <h2>Surprise Box 🎁</h2>

    <div id="singArea">
      <p style="color:#ffb3d1;margin:10px 0">Pehle ek gaana gaao — mic actually sunega! 🎤</p>
      <div class="mic-area">
        <p style="color:#fff;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px">Mic pe gaana gao...</p>
        <p style="color:rgba(255,179,209,.6);font-size:.78rem;margin-bottom:10px">(koi bhi gaana — bas awaaz aani chahiye 🎵)</p>

        <!-- Live voice visualizer -->
        <canvas id="voiceCanvas" width="260" height="54" style="border-radius:12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);display:block;margin:0 auto 10px"></canvas>

        <!-- Detected text live -->
        <p id="heardTxt" style="color:var(--pink);font-size:.85rem;min-height:22px;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:8px"></p>

        <button class="mic-btn" id="micBtn" onclick="toggleMic()">🎤</button>
        <p id="micStatus" style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.85rem;margin-top:10px">Button dabao aur gaana gaao 🎵</p>

        <!-- Progress bar fill as user sings -->
        <div style="width:220px;height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:99px;margin:12px auto 0;overflow:hidden">
          <div id="singProgress" style="height:100%;width:0%;background:var(--pink);border-radius:99px;transition:width .3s;box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--pink)"></div>
        </div>
        <p id="singPct" style="color:var(--pink);font-size:.8rem;margin-top:4px">0%</p>
      </div>
      <button class="btn" id="openBoxBtn" onclick="openSurprise()" style="display:none;margin-top:12px">🎁 Box Kholo!</button>
    </div>

    <div id="boxArea" style="display:none">
      <div class="box-wrap" id="boxWrap" onclick="triggerCards()">
        <div class="box-lid" id="boxLid"></div>
        <div class="surprise-box">🎁</div>
      </div>
      <p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.9rem;margin-top:6px">Box pe click karo! 👆</p>
    </div>

    <div id="cardsArea" style="display:none;margin-top:16px">
      <div id="cardSlot"></div>
      <p class="iloveu" id="iloveu">💖 I LOVE YOU PGLI 💖</p>
      <p class="final-line" id="finalLine">You are always beautiful & stronger — No one can beat you 🌟</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
// roundRect polyfill for older browsers
if(!CanvasRenderingContext2D.prototype.roundRect){
  CanvasRenderingContext2D.prototype.roundRect=function(x,y,w,h,r){
    this.beginPath();this.moveTo(x+r,y);
    this.lineTo(x+w-r,y);this.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r);
    this.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r);this.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h);
    this.lineTo(x+r,y+h);this.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r);
    this.lineTo(x,y+r);this.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y);
    this.closePath();return this;
  };
}
</script>
<script>
/* ═══════════════════════════════
   GLOBAL STATE
═══════════════════════════════ */
let userName="My Love";
let board=Array(9).fill(""),over=false;
let sIdx=0;
let slideIdx=0,slideTimer=null;
let micActive=false;

const shayaris=[
`Tum meri har dua mein ho,
Tum meri har saans mein ho,
Tum bina kahe hi samajh jaati ho,
Itna pyar meri har baat mein ho 💕`,

` Teri aankhon mein jo chamak hai,
Woh chamak mere dil mein basti hai,
Tere bina ye zindagi adhuri lagti,
Tu hi meri sabse khoobsoorat hasti hai 🌸 `,

` Chand , sitare , ful, parinde shaam sawera ek trf
sari duniya uska charba(copy)uska  chahera ek trf 🌸 `,
];

const slideQuotes=[
`"Teri muskurahat meri saari dua hai... 🌸"`,
`"Tu khwabon mein bhi pyaari lagti hai... 💕"`,
`"Tere bina ye pal adhure hain... ❤️"`,
`"Tu hai toh sab kuch hai mera... 💖"`,
`"Har photo mein teri aankhein baat karti hain... 🌺"`
];

const lovingCards=[
  { emoji:"💌", text:"Tum meri sabse khoobsoorat feeling ho..." },
  { emoji:"🌹", text:"Teri hansi meri duniya roshan karti hai..." },
  { emoji:"💝", text:"Tum se mile bina ye dil adhura tha..." },
  { emoji:"✨", text:"Tum sirf meri ho, aur main sirf tera..." },
  { emoji:"🥰", text:"Har pal tere saath jeena chahta hun..." },
];

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   NAVIGATION
═══════════════════════════════ */
function show(id){
  document.querySelectorAll(".view").forEach(v=>v.classList.remove("active"));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add("active");
  if(id==="lv1") initShayari();
  if(id==="lv3") initSlideshow();
  if(id==="lv4") startHeartsRain();
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   PASSWORD
═══════════════════════════════ */
function unlock(){
  const p=document.getElementById("pwd").value;
  const n=document.getElementById("uname").value.trim();
  if(p==="2418"){
    userName=n||"My Love";
    show("question");
  }else{
    shakeInput("pwd");
    document.getElementById("pwd").value="";
  }
}
function shakeInput(id){
  const el=document.getElementById(id);
  el.style.borderColor="#ff4444";
  el.style.animation="shake .3s";
  setTimeout(()=>{el.style.borderColor="";el.style.animation=""},600);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   NOT BUTTON DODGE
═══════════════════════════════ */
function dodgeBtn(btn){
  const vw=window.innerWidth,vh=window.innerHeight;
  btn.style.position="fixed";
  btn.style.left=Math.random()*(vw-120)+"px";
  btn.style.top=Math.random()*(vh-60)+"px";
  btn.style.zIndex=9999;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   TIC TAC TOE  —  Smart Pattern
   Pattern: Lose, Lose, Win, Win, Lose, Lose, Win, Win ...
   (repeat every 4 games)
═══════════════════════════════ */
let gameCount=0;   // total games played so far
// pattern[gameCount % 4]: true = user wins, false = AI wins
const gamePattern=[false,false,true,true];

function shouldUserWin(){
  return gamePattern[gameCount % 4];
}

function move(i){
  if(board[i]||over) return;
  board[i]="X";drawBoard();
  if(checkWin("X")){endGame("Tum Jeet Gayi! ❤️ Aage Badhte Hain...",true);return;}
  if(board.every(c=>c)){endGame("Draw! 🤝",false);return;}
  setTimeout(aiMove,450);
}

function aiMove(){
  const userShouldWin=shouldUserWin();
  let mv=-1;

  if(userShouldWin){
    // Let user win — AI plays dumb (random empty cell, avoids blocking)
    let emp=board.map((v,idx)=>v===""?idx:-1).filter(x=>x!==-1);
    // Shuffle to be less predictable
    emp=emp.sort(()=>Math.random()-.5);
    // Avoid completing a win line for AI (play weak)
    mv=emp.find(idx=>{
      board[idx]="O";
      const w=checkWin("O");
      board[idx]="";
      return !w;
    });
    if(mv===undefined||mv===-1) mv=emp[0];
  } else {
    // AI plays smart — win if possible, else block, else random
    mv=bestMove("O");
    if(mv===-1) mv=bestMove("X");
    if(mv===-1){
      let emp=board.map((v,idx)=>v===""?idx:-1).filter(x=>x!==-1);
      mv=emp[Math.floor(Math.random()*emp.length)];
    }
  }

  if(mv===-1||mv===undefined) return;
  board[mv]="O";drawBoard();
  if(checkWin("O")){endGame("AI Jeeta 😅 Ek aur try karo!",false);return;}
  if(board.every(c=>c)){endGame("Draw! 🤝",false);}
}

function bestMove(p){
  const wins=[[0,1,2],[3,4,5],[6,7,8],[0,3,6],[1,4,7],[2,5,8],[0,4,8],[2,4,6]];
  for(let w of wins){
    const vals=w.map(i=>board[i]);
    if(vals.filter(v=>v===p).length===2&&vals.includes(""))
      return w[vals.indexOf("")];
  }
  return -1;
}
function checkWin(p){
  return[[0,1,2],[3,4,5],[6,7,8],[0,3,6],[1,4,7],[2,5,8],[0,4,8],[2,4,6]].some(a=>a.every(i=>board[i]===p));
}
function drawBoard(){
  document.querySelectorAll(".cell").forEach((c,i)=>{
    c.textContent=board[i]==="X"?"❤️":board[i]==="O"?"💙":"";
  });
}
function endGame(msg,won){
  over=true;
  gameCount++;   // count this game done
  document.getElementById("gStatus").textContent=msg;
  document.getElementById("resetBtn").style.display=won?"none":"inline-block";
  if(won) setTimeout(()=>show("lv1"),1400);
}
function resetGame(){
  board=Array(9).fill("");over=false;
  document.getElementById("gStatus").textContent="";
  document.getElementById("resetBtn").style.display="none";
  drawBoard();
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   LEVEL 1 — SHAYARI
═══════════════════════════════ */
function initShayari(){sIdx=0;renderShayari();}
function renderShayari(){
  typeText("sText",shayaris[sIdx]);
  const dots=document.querySelectorAll("#sDots .dot");
  dots.forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle("active",i===sIdx));
  document.getElementById("sNextBtn").textContent=sIdx<shayaris.length-1?"Agli Shayari 💕":"Aage Badhna 💖";
}
function nextShayari(){
  if(sIdx<shayaris.length-1){sIdx++;renderShayari();}
  else show("lv2");
}
function typeText(id,text){
  const el=document.getElementById(id);
  el.textContent="";let i=0;
  const t=setInterval(()=>{el.textContent+=text[i];i++;if(i>=text.length)clearInterval(t);},35);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   LEVEL 2 — NAME VERIFY
═══════════════════════════════ */
const anshuVariants=["anshu","anshuu","Anshu","ANSHU","anshoo","ansoo"];
const aadiVariants=["aadi","Aadi","AADI","AADITYA","aaditya","Aaditya","aditya","Aditya","ADITYA"];
function verifyNames(){
  const her=document.getElementById("herName").value.trim();
  const his=document.getElementById("hisName").value.trim();
  const errEl=document.getElementById("nameErr");
  if(anshuVariants.includes(her)&&aadiVariants.includes(his)){
    errEl.textContent="";
    spawnEmoji("💕");
    setTimeout(()=>show("lv3"),600);
  }else{
    errEl.textContent="❌ Naam sahi nahi! Anshu & Aadi daalo 💔";
    setTimeout(()=>errEl.textContent="",2500);
  }
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   LEVEL 3 — SLIDESHOW
═══════════════════════════════ */
function initSlideshow(){
  slideIdx=0;
  updateSlide();
  if(slideTimer) clearInterval(slideTimer);
  slideTimer=setInterval(()=>{slideIdx=(slideIdx+1)%5;updateSlide();},4500);
}
function updateSlide(){
  document.querySelectorAll("#slideWrap img").forEach((img,i)=>img.classList.toggle("visible",i===slideIdx));
  document.querySelectorAll("#slideDots .dot").forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle("active",i===slideIdx));
  typeText("slideQ",slideQuotes[slideIdx]);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   LEVEL 4 — SONGS
═══════════════════════════════ */
const audios=[null, document.getElementById("audio1"), document.getElementById("audio2")];

function playSong(n){
  // Show player
  const player=document.getElementById("player"+n);
  player.style.display="block";
  document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card").classList.add("playing");

  const a=document.getElementById("audio"+n);
  if(a.paused){
    // Pause other
    const other=document.getElementById("audio"+(n===1?2:1));
    if(other && !other.paused){other.pause();document.getElementById("pp"+(n===1?2:1)).textContent="▶";document.getElementById("song"+(n===1?2:1)+"Card").classList.remove("playing");}
    a.play().catch(()=>{document.getElementById("audioErrMsg").style.display="block";});
    document.getElementById("pp"+n).textContent="⏸";
  } else {
    a.pause();
    document.getElementById("pp"+n).textContent="▶";
    document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card").classList.remove("playing");
  }
  startHeartsRain();
}

function togglePlay(n){
  const a=document.getElementById("audio"+n);
  if(a.paused){
    a.play().catch(()=>{document.getElementById("audioErrMsg").style.display="block";});
    document.getElementById("pp"+n).textContent="⏸";
    document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card").classList.add("playing");
  } else {
    a.pause();
    document.getElementById("pp"+n).textContent="▶";
    document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card").classList.remove("playing");
  }
}

function updateProgress(n){
  const a=document.getElementById("audio"+n);
  if(!a.duration) return;
  const pct=(a.currentTime/a.duration)*100;
  document.getElementById("fill"+n).style.width=pct+"%";
  const m=Math.floor(a.currentTime/60);
  const s=Math.floor(a.currentTime%60).toString().padStart(2,"0");
  document.getElementById("time"+n).textContent=m+":"+s;
}

function seek(e,n){
  const a=document.getElementById("audio"+n);
  const track=document.getElementById("track"+n);
  const rect=track.getBoundingClientRect();
  const pct=(e.clientX-rect.left)/rect.width;
  a.currentTime=pct*a.duration;
}

function toggleMute(n){
  const a=document.getElementById("audio"+n);
  a.muted=!a.muted;
  event.target.textContent=a.muted?"🔇":"🔊";
}

function resetPlayer(n){
  document.getElementById("pp"+n).textContent="▶";
  document.getElementById("fill"+n).style.width="0%";
  document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card").classList.remove("playing");
}

function audioErr(n){
  // Show upload option
  showUploadOption(n);
}

function showUploadOption(n){
  const card=document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card");
  let uploadDiv=document.getElementById("upload"+n);
  if(!uploadDiv){
    uploadDiv=document.createElement("div");
    uploadDiv.id="upload"+n;
    uploadDiv.style.cssText="margin-top:10px;padding:12px;background:rgba(255,95,162,.1);border-radius:12px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,95,162,.4)";
    uploadDiv.innerHTML=`<p style="color:#ffb3d1;font-size:.8rem;margin-bottom:8px">🎵 Apni device se song upload karo</p>
      <input type="file" accept="audio/*" onchange="loadLocalSong(event,${n})" style="color:#fff;font-size:.8rem;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer">`;
    card.appendChild(uploadDiv);
    document.getElementById("player"+n).style.display="block";
  }
}

function loadLocalSong(event, n){
  const file=event.target.files[0];
  if(!file) return;
  const url=URL.createObjectURL(file);
  const a=document.getElementById("audio"+n);
  a.src=url;
  a.load();
  a.play().then(()=>{
    document.getElementById("pp"+n).textContent="⏸";
    document.getElementById("song"+n+"Card").classList.add("playing");
    document.getElementById("audioErrMsg").style.display="none";
    startHeartsRain();
  }).catch(e=>console.log(e));
}
function startHeartsRain(){
  const rain=document.getElementById("heartsRain");
  rain.style.display="block";
  const emojis=["❤️","💕","💖","💗","🌸","✨","💓"];
  let count=0;
  const iv=setInterval(()=>{
    const h=document.createElement("div");
    h.style.cssText="position:absolute;font-size:"+Math.random()*20+18+"px;left:"+Math.random()*100+"%;top:0;animation:floatUp "+Math.random()*2+2+"s linear forwards";
    h.textContent=emojis[Math.floor(Math.random()*emojis.length)];
    rain.appendChild(h);
    setTimeout(()=>h.remove(),4000);
    if(++count>30) clearInterval(iv);
  },300);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   LEVEL 5 — SURPRISE BOX
═══════════════════════════════ */
/* ═══════════════════════════════
   MIC — Real Web Speech + AudioContext Visualizer
═══════════════════════════════ */
let audioCtx=null, analyser=null, micStream=null, animFrame=null;
let speechRec=null, singScore=0, singGoal=12; // need ~12 speech detections

function toggleMic(){
  if(micActive){stopMic(false);}else{startMic();}
}

function startMic(){
  micActive=true;
  singScore=0;
  document.getElementById("micBtn").classList.add("listening");
  document.getElementById("micBtn").textContent="⏹";
  document.getElementById("micStatus").textContent="Sun raha hun... gaana gao! 🎵";
  document.getElementById("singProgress").style.width="0%";
  document.getElementById("singPct").textContent="0%";
  document.getElementById("heardTxt").textContent="";

  // 1) AudioContext for canvas visualizer
  navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({audio:true})
    .then(stream=>{
      micStream=stream;
      audioCtx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
      analyser=audioCtx.createAnalyser();
      analyser.fftSize=64;
      audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(stream).connect(analyser);
      drawVoiceCanvas();
    })
    .catch(()=>{
      document.getElementById("micStatus").textContent="Mic permission do please 🙏";
      micActive=false;
    });

  // 2) Web Speech API for actual voice detection
  const SR=window.SpeechRecognition||window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
  if(SR){
    speechRec=new SR();
    speechRec.continuous=true;
    speechRec.interimResults=true;
    speechRec.lang="hi-IN";  // Hindi first
    speechRec.onresult=e=>{
      const t=Array.from(e.results).map(r=>r[0].transcript).join(" ");
      document.getElementById("heardTxt").textContent="🎵 "+t.slice(-40);
      // Count interim results as progress
      singScore=Math.min(singGoal, singScore+1);
      updateSingProgress();
    };
    speechRec.onerror=()=>{
      // If Hindi fails try again without lang constraint
      if(speechRec) try{speechRec.lang="";speechRec.start();}catch(e){}
    };
    speechRec.onend=()=>{
      if(micActive) try{speechRec.start();}catch(e){} // keep listening
    };
    try{speechRec.start();}catch(e){}
  } else {
    // Fallback: no Speech API — use volume-based detection
    startVolumeFallback();
  }
}

function startVolumeFallback(){
  // Count seconds of non-silence as progress
  let volTimer=setInterval(()=>{
    if(!micActive){clearInterval(volTimer);return;}
    if(analyser){
      const data=new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);
      analyser.getByteFrequencyData(data);
      const avg=data.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/data.length;
      if(avg>15){ // voice detected
        singScore=Math.min(singGoal,singScore+1);
        updateSingProgress();
      }
    }
  },500);
}

function updateSingProgress(){
  const pct=Math.round((singScore/singGoal)*100);
  document.getElementById("singProgress").style.width=pct+"%";
  document.getElementById("singPct").textContent=pct+"%";
  if(singScore>=singGoal) stopMic(true);
}

function drawVoiceCanvas(){
  if(!micActive||!analyser){return;}
  const canvas=document.getElementById("voiceCanvas");
  if(!canvas) return;
  const ctx=canvas.getContext("2d");
  const data=new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);
  analyser.getByteFrequencyData(data);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  const barW=canvas.width/data.length;
  data.forEach((val,i)=>{
    const h=(val/255)*canvas.height;
    const r=255, g=95+(val*.4)|0, b=162;
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.85)`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.roundRect(i*barW+1, canvas.height-h, barW-2, h, 3);
    ctx.fill();
  });
  animFrame=requestAnimationFrame(drawVoiceCanvas);
}

function stopMic(done){
  micActive=false;
  if(speechRec){try{speechRec.stop();}catch(e){}speechRec=null;}
  if(micStream){micStream.getTracks().forEach(t=>t.stop());micStream=null;}
  if(audioCtx){try{audioCtx.close();}catch(e){}audioCtx=null;}
  if(animFrame){cancelAnimationFrame(animFrame);animFrame=null;}
  document.getElementById("micBtn").classList.remove("listening");
  document.getElementById("micBtn").textContent="🎤";
  // Clear canvas
  const canvas=document.getElementById("voiceCanvas");
  if(canvas) canvas.getContext("2d").clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);

  if(done){
    singScore=singGoal;
    document.getElementById("singProgress").style.width="100%";
    document.getElementById("singPct").textContent="100%";
    document.getElementById("heardTxt").textContent="🎉 Wah! Kitna sundar gaaya!";
    document.getElementById("micStatus").textContent="Shabash! Ab box kholo 🎁";
    document.getElementById("micBtn").style.display="none";
    document.getElementById("openBoxBtn").style.display="inline-block";
    spawnEmoji("🎵");
  }else{
    document.getElementById("micStatus").textContent="Pehle poora gaana gao 🎵";
  }
}
function openSurprise(){
  document.getElementById("singArea").style.display="none";
  document.getElementById("boxArea").style.display="block";
}
let cardsTriggered=false;
function triggerCards(){
  if(cardsTriggered) return;
  cardsTriggered=true;
  document.getElementById("boxWrap").classList.add("open");
  // Burst emojis
  const em=["💖","💕","🌸","✨","💝","🎀","💗","🥰","❤️","🌺"];
  for(let i=0;i<40;i++){
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const d=document.createElement("div");
      d.className="floaty";
      d.textContent=em[Math.floor(Math.random()*em.length)];
      d.style.left=Math.random()*100+"vw";
      d.style.bottom="0";
      d.style.animationDuration=Math.random()*2+2+"s";
      document.body.appendChild(d);
      setTimeout(()=>d.remove(),4000);
    },i*80);
  }
  // Show cards one by one
  document.getElementById("cardsArea").style.display="block";
  const slot=document.getElementById("cardSlot");
  slot.innerHTML="";
  let ci=0;
  function showCard(){
    if(ci>=lovingCards.length){
      // Show I LOVE YOU PGLI
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const il=document.getElementById("iloveu");
        il.style.display="block";
        for(let j=0;j<25;j++){
          setTimeout(()=>{
            const d=document.createElement("div");
            d.className="floaty";
            d.textContent="💖";
            d.style.left=Math.random()*100+"vw";
            d.style.bottom="0";
            d.style.fontSize=Math.random()*30+20+"px";
            document.body.appendChild(d);
            setTimeout(()=>d.remove(),3500);
          },j*100);
        }
        // Final line
        setTimeout(()=>{
          document.getElementById("finalLine").style.display="block";
        },1500);
      },500);
      return;
    }
    const c=lovingCards[ci];
    const el=document.createElement("div");
    el.style.cssText="background:rgba(255,95,162,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,95,162,.4);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;margin:10px 0;animation:fadeUp .5s ease;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px";
    el.innerHTML="<span style=\"font-size:2rem\">" +c.emoji+"</span><p style=\"color:#ffb3d1;font-style:italic;font-size:1rem\">"+c.text+"</p>";
    slot.appendChild(el);
    ci++;
    setTimeout(showCard,900);
  }
  setTimeout(showCard,800);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════
   HELPERS
═══════════════════════════════ */
function spawnEmoji(em){
  for(let i=0;i<20;i++){
    const d=document.createElement("div");
    d.className="floaty";
    d.textContent=em;
    d.style.left=Math.random()*100+"vw";
    d.style.bottom="0";
    d.style.animationDuration=Math.random()*1.5+1.5+"s";
    document.body.appendChild(d);
    setTimeout(()=>d.remove(),3500);
  }
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
